message:
fix: Robot mode code review fixes

- Remove unused context import
- Use health.DefaultHealthConfig() thresholds in getHealthReason
  instead of hardcoded 5/2 (should be 3/1 per ErrorCountCritical/Warning)
- Add provider validation in runRobotWatch command
- Simplify context handling in runRobotWatch (remove unnecessary goroutine)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
